name: guto-express-v53
description: Scripts de conveniência — instale dependências em backend/ e frontend/

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BE,FE -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.ci: npm run test:ci --prefix backend && npm run test:node --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n BE,FE,EL -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 http-get://127.0.0.1:3210/health && electron ."
